🎉 Congratulations!

Dear {{ $json.Name }},

We are thrilled to inform you that after carefully reviewing your application for the {{ $json.Role }} position at Trilles AI, we are impressed with your qualifications and would love to move forward.

Your AI Evaluation Score: {{ $json['AI Score'] }}/100

Assessment: {{ $json['AI Summary'] }}

We would like to invite you for an interview to discuss your experience and how you can contribute to our team.

📅 Interview Details

A Google Calendar invitation has been sent to your email with the interview time slot. Please accept the invite to confirm your participation.

Format: Video call (Google Meet link in calendar invite)
Duration: 45-60 minutes

Please reply to this email if you have any questions or need to reschedule.

Best regards,
The Trilles AI Hiring Team

Trilles AI | www.trillesai.com

parameters.subject: =Your Application for {{ $json.Role }} at Trilles AI
parameters.message:
=

Thank You for Applying

Dear {{ $json.Name }},

Thank you for taking the time to apply for the {{ $json.Role }} position at Trilles AI. We genuinely appreciate your interest in joining our team.

After carefully reviewing your application, we have decided to move forward with other candidates whose qualifications more closely align with our current requirements for this specific role.

  • Continue developing your skills in this field
  • Apply again in the future as we grow and open new positions
  • Follow us on LinkedIn to stay updated on future opportunities

We wish you all the best in your job search and future endeavors!

Warm regards,
The Trilles AI Hiring Team

Trilles AI | www.trillesai.com
